openSpec.summary: Add reset-token issuance and password update endpoints; reuse existing auth password policy.

implementation.summary: Implemented token create/consume flows and password update with expiry checks.

verificationNotes: Request reset for a known user and confirm email (or outbox) contains a link.
Complete reset and sign in with the new password.
Replay an expired token and confirm rejection.
technicalRisks: Email delivery latency may affect exploratory timing.
alternativesConsidered: Magic-link login only — rejected to keep password auth.
